theme: one backbone network versus targeted outages
title: Grid Spine Under Targeted Outages
mutation: composite: budgeted link selection (sparsification) + planted single-link cut scenarios + a connectivity-penalty/shortest-path-stretch objective, so the intended solution is a hitting set over the cuts the scenario family collectively attacks -- not per-failure patching or uniform thickening
strategies: spine-only baseline: keep exactly the M spine links, buy no reinforcement (scores 0.1)
per-scenario patch (trap): for each outage add the cheapest spare parallel to the destroyed link; exhausts the 2C budget after healing 2C of 3C scenarios, leaving C severed

hitting-set insight: every scenario attacks a link inside some block, so one wide end-to-end link per block heals all three of that block's scenarios; C reinforcements heal all 3C outages within budget
budget-aware refinement (headroom): after the hitting set, spend spare budget on narrow spares to shorten the detour distance on the most-evaluated blocks
